expectations.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
expectations.evidence: Phase 0 model check notice included verbatim.

expectations.text: Response includes an Assumption Map table before the first question
expectations.evidence: 13-assumption map: 4 🔴 blockers (JWT fit, refresh rotation, revocation, client storage), 7 🟡, 2 🟢.

expectations.text: First question follows the template with a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
expectations.evidence: First question tagged 🔴 — why JWT at all (the most fundamental risk).

expectations.text: Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Single question with four labeled options (mobile client, multi-service, third-party API, other).
Recommendation to push back if driver is vague/cargo-culted modernization.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
expectations.evidence: No scorecard. Stops correctly after first question.
